Tim Duncan

Timothy Theodore Duncan

(Timmy, The Big Fundamental, Groundhog Day, Old Man Riverwalk, The Stone Buddha)

Position: Center and Power Forward ▪ Shoots: Right

6-11, 250lb (211cm, 113kg)

Born: April 25, 1976 in St. Croix, U.S. Virgin Islands vi

College: Wake Forest

High School: Saint Dunstan's Episcopal in Saint Croix, U.S. Virgin Islands

Draft: San Antonio Spurs, 1st round (1st pick, 1st overall), 1997 NBA Draft

NBA Debut: October 31, 1997

Hall of Fame: Inducted as Player in 2020 (Full List)

Career Length: 19 years

  • Hall of Fame
  • 15x All Star
  • 5x NBA Champ
  • 15x All-NBA
  • 15x All-Defensive
  • 1997-98 All-Rookie
  • 1997-98 ROY
  • 3x Finals MVP
  • 1999-00 AS MVP
  • 2x MVP
  • NBA 75th Anniv. Team
Become a Stathead & surf this site ad-free.

POWERED BY
Tim Duncan played in 1,158 career wins (regular season and playoffs combined). Can you name the only 3 other players to play in at least 1,100 wins?

Salaries

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is Tim Duncan?

Tim Duncan is 50 years old.

Where was Tim Duncan born?

Tim Duncan was born in St. Croix, U.S. Virgin Islands.

When was Tim Duncan born?

Tim Duncan was born on April 25, 1976.

How tall is Tim Duncan?

Tim Duncan is 6-11 (211 cm) tall.

How much did Tim Duncan weigh when playing?

Tim Duncan weighed 250 lbs (113 kg) when playing.

Is Tim Duncan in the Hall of Fame?

Tim Duncan was inducted to the Hall of Fame as a Player in 2020 (Full List) .

When was Tim Duncan drafted?

Tim Duncan was drafted by San Antonio Spurs, 1st round (1st pick, 1st overall), 1997 NBA Draft.

What position did Tim Duncan play?

Center and Power Forward.

When did Tim Duncan retire?

Tim Duncan last played in 2016.

What is Tim Duncan's net worth?

Tim Duncan made at least $245,352,905 playing professional basketball.

How much did Tim Duncan make?

Tim Duncan made $22,183,220 in 2010.

What did Tim Duncan average?

Tim Duncan averaged 19.0 points, 10.8 rebounds, and 3.0 assists per game.

How many rings does Tim Duncan have?

Tim Duncan won 5 championships.

What schools did Tim Duncan attend?

Tim Duncan attended Saint Dunstan's Episcopal in Saint Croix, U.S. Virgin Islands and Wake Forest.

What are Tim Duncan's nicknames?

Timmy, The Big Fundamental, Groundhog Day, Old Man Riverwalk, The Stone Buddha are nicknames for Tim Duncan.

Name + "Statistics" Translations
